creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Joe Marcus Clarke from comment #2)
> Give this a shot just to make sure I haven't hurt anything else:

Thanks, Marcus!  I've tested this with a couple of my ports (and also
the testcases I had for this), and everything appears fine.

No more false positives for sure, the tricky question is whether there
are any (or more) false negatives now, of course...
